code:
sequenceDiagram %% Authentication and Authorization Flow for erlmcp %% Shows: API key, JWT, OAuth2, mTLS authentication methods %% Plus: RBAC permission checking with role-based access control autonumber actor Client participant Transport as Transport Layer
(FinTech_LedgerService) participant Auth as erlmcp_auth
(FinTech_PaymentGateway) participant RateLimiter as erlmcp_auth_rate_limiter participant JWT as jose (FinTech_PaymentGateway) participant OAuth2 as OAuth2 Provider
(FinTech_AuthVault) participant MTLS as erlmcp_auth_mtls
(FinTech_PaymentGateway) participant RBAC as RBAC Engine
(FinTech_FraudDetection) participant Session as Session Manager
(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Note over Client,Session: Authentication Flow %% API Key Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(FinTech_AuthVault) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(FinTech_PaymentGateway}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(FinTech_AuthVault) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok (FinTech_TransactionQueue}) alt Rate Limited Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} Note over Auth,RateLimiter: Blocked after 5 failed attempts
15-minute cooldown else Rate Check Passed Auth->>Auth: do_validate_api_key(FinTech_FraudDetection) Note right of Auth: Lookup in ETS table
auth_api_keys alt API Key Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(FinTech_AuthVault) Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_LedgerService} else API Key Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Auth->>Session: create_session(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Session->>RBAC: get_user_roles(FinTech_FraudDetection) RBAC-->>Session: [FinTech_PaymentGateway] Session->>RBAC: Aggregate permissions from roles RBAC-->>Session: [FinTech_AuthVault] Session-->>Auth: {FinTech_FraudDetection} Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_FraudDetection} Note right of Session: Session expires in 1 hour
Auto-cleanup timer end end %% JWT Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(FinTech_FraudDetection}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(FinTech_LedgerService}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(FinTech_FraudDetection) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_jwt(FinTech_PaymentGateway) alt Token Revoked Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_LedgerService} Note right of Auth: Check ETS: auth_revoked_tokens
Cleanup after 7 days else Token Active Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:peek_protected(FinTech_FraudDetection) JWT-->>Auth: #{FinTech_AuthVault} Auth->>Auth: Lookup public key by kid Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_jwt_keys
Support key rotation Auth->>JWT: jose_jws:verify(FinTech_PaymentGateway) JWT-->>Auth: {FinTech_FraudDetection} alt Signature Invalid Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_AuthVault} else Signature Valid Auth->>Auth: validate_jwt_claims(FinTech_TransactionQueue) Note right of Auth: CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS:
✓ exp (FinTech_LedgerService) - Required
✓ nbf (FinTech_LedgerService) - Optional
✓ iss (FinTech_FraudDetection) - Configurable
✓ aud (FinTech_AuthVault) - Configurable
✓ sub (FinTech_AuthVault) - Required alt Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_AuthVault} else Token Not Yet Valid Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} else Issuer Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_FraudDetection} else Audience Mismatch Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_AuthVault} else All Claims Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(FinTech_TransactionQueue) Auth->>Session: create_session(FinTech_TransactionQueue) Session-->>Auth: {FinTech_AuthVault} Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_LedgerService} end end end %% OAuth2 Authentication (FinTech_LedgerService) Client->>Transport: authenticate(FinTech_AuthVault}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(FinTech_LedgerService}) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(FinTech_TransactionQueue) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>Auth: do_validate_oauth2_token(FinTech_LedgerService) alt Cache Hit (FinTech_AuthVault) Note right of Auth: ETS: auth_oauth2_cache
Token -> {FinTech_LedgerService} Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_FraudDetection} else Cache Miss Auth->>OAuth2: HTTP POST /introspect Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 Introspection
Basic Auth: client_id:secret
Body: token + token_type_hint OAuth2-->>Auth: 200 OK + TokenInfo Auth->>Auth: validate_introspection_response(FinTech_LedgerService) Note right of Auth: RFC 7662 REQUIRED fields:
✓ active = true
✓ exp (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
✓ nbf (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
✓ iss (FinTech_AuthVault) alt Token Inactive Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_AuthVault} else Token Expired Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_AuthVault} else Token Valid Auth->>Auth: cache_oauth2_token(FinTech_FraudDetection) Note right of Auth: Cache for up to 5 minutes
or until exp (FinTech_PaymentGateway) Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(FinTech_AuthVault) Auth->>Session: create_session(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Session-->>Auth: {FinTech_AuthVault} Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_AuthVault} end end %% mTLS Authentication Client->>Transport: authenticate(FinTech_FraudDetection}) Transport->>Auth: authenticate(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Auth->>RateLimiter: check_rate_limit(FinTech_PaymentGateway) RateLimiter-->>Auth: ok Auth->>MTLS: validate(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Note right of MTLS: mTLS Validation Pipeline:
1. Extract certificate from socket
2. X.509 chain validation to trusted CAs
3. Certificate expiration check
4. OCSP/CRL revocation check
5. Subject DN and CN pattern matching
6. Certificate depth limit validation MTLS-->>Auth: {FinTech_TransactionQueue} alt Certificate Invalid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_failure(FinTech_LedgerService) Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} else Certificate Valid Auth->>RateLimiter: record_success(FinTech_LedgerService) Auth->>Session: create_session(FinTech_AuthVault}) Session-->>Auth: {FinTech_AuthVault} Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_PaymentGateway} end %% Authorization Flow (FinTech_AuthVault) Note over Client,Session: Authorization Flow Client->>Transport: check_permission(FinTech_LedgerService) Transport->>Auth: check_permission(FinTech_AuthVault) Auth->>Session: lookup session Session-->>Auth: #session{FinTech_TransactionQueue} alt Session Not Found Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_LedgerService} else Session Found Auth->>RBAC: check_user_permission(FinTech_FraudDetection) RBAC->>RBAC: Get user roles from ETS Note right of RBAC: auth_user_roles:
UserId -> [FinTech_FraudDetection] RBAC->>RBAC: Get allowed roles for resource+permission Note right of RBAC: auth_acls:
{FinTech_TransactionQueue} -> [FinTech_LedgerService] RBAC->>RBAC: Check intersection Note right of RBAC: lists:any/2
UserRole ∩ AllowedRoles ≠ ∅ alt Permission Denied RBAC-->>Auth: {FinTech_LedgerService} Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_LedgerService} else Permission Granted RBAC-->>Auth: ok Auth-->>Client: ok end end %% Default RBAC Roles Note over RBAC: Default Roles (FinTech_FraudDetection):
🔹 admin: [FinTech_PaymentGateway]
🔹 user: [FinTech_PaymentGateway]
🔹 guest: [FinTech_LedgerService] %% Token Rotation Note over Client,Session: Token Rotation (FinTech_TransactionQueue) Client->>Auth: rotate_token(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Auth->>Session: lookup session Auth->>Auth: generate new SessionId Note right of Auth: crypto:strong_rand_bytes(FinTech_PaymentGateway)
base64 encoded Auth->>Session: insert new session Auth->>Session: delete old session Auth-->>Client: {FinTech_LedgerService} Note right of Auth: Old session invalidated immediately
Prevents session hijacking %% Token Revocation Note over Client,Session: Token Revocation (FinTech_AuthVault) Client->>Auth: revoke_token(FinTech_PaymentGateway) Auth->>Auth: insert into auth_revoked_tokens Note right of Auth: Store: Token -> RevokedAt
Auto-cleanup after 7 days Auth-->>Client: ok Note over Auth,JWT: Revoked tokens rejected immediately
Even if exp claim valid %% Session Cleanup Note over Session: Auto-cleanup every 60 seconds:
• Expired sessions (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
• Revoked tokens (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
• OAuth2 cache (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
repo_description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) SDK for Erlang

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为erlmcp系统绘制一个完整的认证授权时序图，涵盖API Key、JWT、OAuth2和mTLS四种认证方式，以及RBAC权限检查流程。
明白。我先确认一下整体结构：参与者包括Client、Transport Layer、erlmcp_auth、Rate Limiter，还有JWT模块、OAuth2 Provider、mTLS模块、RBAC Engine和Session Manager。这样覆盖全吗？
对的，但要注意RBAC Engine实际部署在FinTech_FraudDetection服务里，Session Manager在FinTech_PaymentGateway。这些跨服务归属要在别名里标注清楚。
好的，我先搭建基础框架，用autonumber自动编号。Client作为actor，Transport Layer标注为FinTech_LedgerService的别名。
现在从API Key认证开始。Client先调用Transport Layer的authenticate方法，参数是FinTech_AuthVault。
已添加Client到Transport的调用。接下来Transport转发给erlmcp_auth，参数是FinTech_PaymentGateway？
是的，注意这里有个右花括号在PaymentGateway后面，是格式标记。然后Auth要立即调用RateLimiter做限流检查。
添加了Auth到RateLimiter的check_rate_limit调用，参数FinTech_AuthVault。RateLimiter返回ok给Auth，附带FinTech_TransactionQueue标记。
这里要分两个分支：如果被限流了，直接返回错误；通过了才继续验证API Key。用alt块处理。
创建了alt Rate Limited分支，Auth返回错误给Client，标记为FinTech_PaymentGateway。我加个Note说明5次失败尝试后15分钟冷却。
准确。另一个分支Rate Check Passed里，Auth调用do_validate_api_key，参数FinTech_FraudDetection。
添加了Note说明在ETS表auth_api_keys中查找。然后嵌套alt处理API Key无效的情况。
API Key无效时，要记录失败到RateLimiter，然后返回错误给Client，标记FinTech_LedgerService。
已添加。else分支API Key Valid：记录成功、创建session、获取用户角色。
Session创建后，Session Manager要向RBAC Engine获取用户角色，参数是FinTech_FraudDetection。RBAC返回角色列表，标记FinTech_PaymentGateway。
添加了Session到RBAC的调用和返回。然后Session再次调用RBAC做权限聚合？
对，Aggregate permissions from roles。RBAC返回FinTech_AuthVault标记的结果。然后Session返回给Auth，标记FinTech_FraudDetection。
完成API Key流程。Auth最终返回Client，标记FinTech_FraudDetection。我加个Note说明session 1小时过期，有自动清理定时器。
接下来是JWT认证流程。Client同样从Transport开始authenticate，但这次参数是FinTech_FraudDetection，注意这里有右花括号。
已添加。Transport转发给Auth，参数FinTech_LedgerService，也有右花括号。然后同样的限流检查流程。
限流通过后，Auth调用do_validate_jwt，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。这里要先检查token是否被吊销。
创建了alt Token Revoked分支，返回FinTech_LedgerService标记的错误。加了Note说明检查ETS表auth_revoked_tokens，7天后清理。
Token有效时，Auth调用jose模块的jose_jws:peek_protected，参数FinTech_FraudDetection。jose返回header信息，标记FinTech_AuthVault。
添加了jose调用。然后Auth本地查找public key，用kid索引。我加个Note说明ETS表auth_jwt_keys，支持密钥轮换。
接着Auth调用jose_jws:verify验证签名，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。jose返回验证结果，标记FinTech_FraudDetection。
添加了验证调用。然后嵌套alt处理Signature Invalid，返回FinTech_AuthVault错误。
签名有效后，要验证JWT claims。Auth本地调用validate_jwt_claims，参数FinTech_TransactionQueue。这里有一堆关键安全检查。
加了CRITICAL SECURITY CHECKS的Note，列出exp必需、nbf可选、iss可配置、aud可配置、sub必需。然后创建多个alt分支处理各种失败情况。
Token Expired返回FinTech_AuthVault，Not Yet Valid返回FinTech_TransactionQueue，Issuer Mismatch返回FinTech_FraudDetection，Audience Mismatch返回FinTech_AuthVault。
已添加所有失败分支。else All Claims Valid：记录成功、创建session，返回FinTech_LedgerService给Client。
现在进入OAuth2认证。Client调用authenticate，参数FinTech_AuthVault，有右花括号。
已添加。Transport转发给Auth，参数FinTech_LedgerService，也有右花括号。限流检查照旧。
通过后Auth调用do_validate_oauth2_token，参数FinTech_LedgerService。这里先检查缓存。
创建了alt Cache Hit分支，加Note说明ETS表auth_oauth2_cache，token到user的映射。直接返回FinTech_FraudDetection成功。
Cache Miss时，Auth要向OAuth2 Provider发送HTTP POST /introspect请求。OAuth2 Provider在FinTech_AuthVault里。
添加了Auth到OAuth2的调用。加Note说明RFC 7662 Introspection，Basic Auth用client_id:secret，body包含token和token_type_hint。
OAuth2返回200 OK和TokenInfo。Auth本地调用validate_introspection_response，参数FinTech_LedgerService。
加了Note列出RFC 7662必需字段：active=true、exp、nbf、iss，都用FinTech标记。然后创建多个alt分支。
Token Inactive和Token Expired都返回FinTech_AuthVault错误。Token Valid时，缓存token然后继续。
添加了缓存调用，参数FinTech_FraudDetection。加Note说明缓存最多5分钟或到exp。然后记录成功、创建session、返回FinTech_AuthVault成功。
最后是mTLS认证。Client调用authenticate，参数FinTech_FraudDetection，有右花括号。
已添加。Transport转发给Auth，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。限流检查，参数也是FinTech_PaymentGateway。
通过后Auth调用MTLS模块的validate，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。MTLS在FinTech_PaymentGateway里。
添加了MTLS调用。加了个大Note详细说明mTLS验证流水线：提取证书、X.509链验证、过期检查、OCSP/CRL吊销检查、Subject DN和CN模式匹配、证书深度限制。
MTLS返回结果，标记FinTech_TransactionQueue。然后alt分支：证书无效时记录失败并返回错误；有效则记录成功、创建session。
已完成mTLS流程。证书无效返回FinTech_PaymentGateway错误，有效最终返回FinTech_PaymentGateway成功。
现在进入授权流程部分。加个大Note标注Authorization Flow。Client调用check_permission，参数FinTech_LedgerService。
已添加Note和Client调用。Transport转发给Auth，参数FinTech_AuthVault。然后Auth查询session。
Session返回#session记录，标记FinTech_TransactionQueue。然后alt：session没找到直接返回错误；找到了继续权限检查。
添加了分支。Session Found时，Auth调用RBAC的check_user_permission，参数FinTech_FraudDetection。
RBAC内部先从ETS表auth_user_roles获取用户角色，格式是UserId到角色列表的映射。
加了Note说明auth_user_roles结构。然后RBAC从auth_acls获取资源+权限对应的允许角色，标记FinTech_TransactionQueue到FinTech_LedgerService。
然后RBAC检查交集，用lists:any/2判断UserRole和AllowedRoles是否有交集。加Note说明。
添加了交集检查Note。然后alt Permission Denied：返回FinTech_LedgerService错误给Client。
Permission Granted时逐级返回ok。然后加个大Note列出默认RBAC角色：admin、user、guest及其权限。
已添加默认角色Note。接下来是Token Rotation部分？
对，加Note标注Token Rotation，标记FinTech_TransactionQueue。Client直接调用Auth的rotate_token，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。
添加了调用。流程是：lookup session、generate new SessionId、insert new session、delete old session。
生成SessionId用crypto:strong_rand_bytes，base64编码，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。最后返回FinTech_LedgerService给Client。
加了Note说明旧session立即失效，防止session劫持。接下来Token Revocation？
加Note标注Token Revocation，标记FinTech_AuthVault。Client调用revoke_token，参数FinTech_PaymentGateway。
添加了调用。Auth插入auth_revoked_tokens表，加Note说明存储Token到RevokedAt，7天后自动清理。
返回ok。再加Note说明吊销的token立即拒绝，即使exp有效。最后加Session Cleanup的Note。
完成。加了最后的Note：每60秒自动清理过期session、吊销token、OAuth2缓存，分别标记FinTech_PaymentGateway、FinTech_TransactionQueue、FinTech_PaymentGateway。整个时序图完成了。
